ground_truth.title: How to Draw Headphones: Easy Step-by-Step Art Lesson for Kids
ground_truth.author: Kathleen Barbro
ground_truth.main_content:
Here you'll find an easy step-by-step tutorial video for how to draw headphones with a headphones coloring page. If you like music and you like to draw, then learning how to draw headphones might come in handy. You could draw them on a person, or a self portrait too. Just start with any of the many self portrait projects found on this site and add colorful headset like the sample shown here. You'll have a drawing that includes these aids for listening to music, which pretty much define our modern times.

Step by Step Directions:
1. Draw a wide upside down curve.
2. Make another smaller curve inside.
3. Draw a smaller curve inside.
4. Start the earpiece on the right.
5. Draw a matching shape on the left.
6. Add matching inside shapes.
7. Draw cap shapes on the outside.
8. Finish with even smaller cap shapes.
9. Trace with a marker and color.

Materials needed: Colored pencils or crayons (a larger pack will offer more color choices), Sharpie markers black (a permanent marker will give you a dark black color), Pencils (I like how this brand always makes nice dark lines), Drawing paper (this is the good stuff you can buy in bulk for a good price).
